statement: In every magma, Equation 717 (`x = y * (y * ((y * y) * y))`) implies Equation 2450 (`x = (x * ((x * y) * y)) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0733
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y : G, x = (op y (op y (op (op y y) y)))) :
    ∀ x y : G, x = (op (op x (op (op x y) y)) y)
